Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

I see that ONAP JobBuilder fails consistently.
Would you like to post the test results and I will merge the commit?

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Those images get verified and tested with their CSIT jobs on a daily basis, for example: https://jenkins.onap.org/view/sdc/job/sdc-master-csit-uiSanity-testng/

Besides, SDC charts are under SDC team responsibility.
It can't be that we have to wait and then convince OOM team, when it comes to as minor change as an image version (especially when it comes from the PTL)
Change has been successfully merged by Borislav Glozman
